steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The parenthetical "(discontinued in 2021)" reveals that the required software no longer exists—the reason the artworks are inaccessible.

steps.title: Match the correct word
steps.content:
The word needs to describe software that no longer exists or operates, explaining why the artworks are inaccessible. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — defunct: no longer operating or existing — fits Adobe Flash, which was discontinued in 2021 and cannot be run. ✓
  • Choice B — extraneous: unnecessary or irrelevant — contradicts the passage, which says the artworks require this software; it is not superfluous. ✗
  • Choice C — arcane: obscure or known only to a few — describes something hard to understand, not something unavailable; Flash was once mainstream. ✗
  • Choice D — ubiquitous: found everywhere — the opposite of the problem; if the software were widely available, the artworks would not be inaccessible. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
